iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 01:04 — FALLING. Israel strikes Parchin Taleghan 2 (high-explosives testing chamber for nuclear weapon development) with bunker busters — facility penetrated but this is conventional strike on nuclear-adjacent site, NOT enrichment. No nuclear escalation signals. Khamenei first statement entirely conventional. Latent capability (460kg 60% uranium) remains but operational pathway degraded. Nuclear track continues de-escalation.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 01:04 — RISING/IMMINENT. NEW: (1) Israel strikes Parchin Taleghan 2 — bunker busters penetrated high-explosives testing chamber at suspected nuclear weapon development site. (2) Mojtaba Khamenei reportedly wounded/disfigured per Hegseth — leadership degraded. (3) Blast near Tehran rally attended by Larijani, Pezeshkian, Araghchi — 1 killed. (4) Iran claims 500+ ballistic/naval missiles + ~2,000 drones fired since Feb 28. (5) Oman: 2 dead from intercepted drone near industrial area. (6) Bahrain: 114 missiles + 190 drones intercepted total. (7) 250+ US organizations call Congress to halt war funding ($11.3bn spent). (8) Trump says 'war going well.' Israeli strikes continue on Tehran (security checkpoints, govt buildings, military storage). 1,444 killed / 18,551 injured in Iran per Health Ministry. 82→83.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 01:04 — IMMINENT STABLE. No major new Lebanon-specific developments in this cycle. Zrarieh Bridge destruction + Gaza-scale threats + leaflets over Beirut remain latest escalations. 773 dead in Lebanon. Israel absorbed into Iran war coordination — ground incursion timing unclear. 82 stable.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL — RISING STABLE. Third missile intercept now confirmed by NYT/Reuters/Bloomberg/France24/Al Jazeera. Western officials confirm March 4 missile specifically targeted Incirlik base (houses US B61 nuclear weapons). NATO spokeswoman Allison Hart confirmed 'ballistic missile heading to Turkey' intercepted. Turkey demands Tehran clarify. Article 4 pressure mounting. No 4th intercept yet. 36 stable.

india.notes: Stable deterrent. No new signals. India monitoring Hormuz shipping impacts. No escalation indicators.

russia.notes: Day 15 01:04 — RISING. NEW: Trump announces easing of Russia oil sanctions to compensate for Hormuz disruption — 'We're going to take those sanctions off until the strait [of Hormuz] is up.' This indirectly funds Russian war machine while weakening sanctions leverage. Druzhba pipeline transit suspended (Hungary investigating). Russia casualties ~1.28M total. Russia providing Iran piloting tips (denied by Putin). 8→12 as sanctions relief adds new dimension.

china.notes: Stable deterrent. 13 days of near-zero PLA flights broken Mar 13 with 5 aircraft. US military commanders worried about 'shrinking stockpiles' affecting Asia posture as Marines redeploy from Okinawa to ME ($14B Taiwan arms deal awaiting Trump approval). Trump-Xi summit prep (Mar 31-Apr 2). Pacific force gaps widening as assets shift to ME.

north_korea.notes: Stable elevated. OFAC sanctioned DPRK IT networks. No military provocations. Iran-DPRK cooperation revival 'highly likely.' China-DPRK engagement increasing.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 15 01:04 — RISING. Trump easing Russia oil sanctions to offset Hormuz disruption — sanctions relief directly benefits Russian war funding. Zelensky: US sought postponement of trilateral Ukraine talks. ISW: Russian offensive continues, Ukraine exploiting dispersed positions. Germany-Ukraine military training partnership announced. Russia ~1.28M total casualties, 860 KIA/WIA in 24h. Druzhba pipeline suspended (Hungary investigating). Trump deal stalling as US consumed by Iran war. 28→29.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: No new reports in this cycle. Saudi-Pakistan Strategic Mutual Defence Agreement active. China mediating. Stable elevated.

top_signals: Israel strikes Parchin Taleghan 2 — bunker busters penetrated high-explosives testing chamber at suspected nuclear weapon development site (ISW/Institute for Science and International Security)
Trump easing Russia oil sanctions to offset Hormuz disruption — 'We're going to take those sanctions off until the strait is up' (Guardian/Reuters)
Mojtaba Khamenei reportedly wounded and 'likely disfigured' per US SecDef Hegseth — Iranian leadership degraded (Al Jazeera)
Blast near Tehran rally attended by senior officials (Larijani, Pezeshkian, Araghchi) — 1 killed (Al Jazeera)
Iran claims 500+ ballistic/naval missiles + ~2,000 drones fired since Feb 28 — ~40% toward Israel, ~60% at US targets (Fars News/Wikipedia)
Oman: 2 killed after security forces intercepted drone near industrial area (Al Jazeera/Oman state media)
Bahrain intercepted 114 missiles + 190 drones total since war began Feb 28 (Al Jazeera)
250+ US organizations sign letter calling Congress to halt $11.3bn war funding (Al Jazeera)

new: russia: trump_eases_russia_sanctions — Trump announces easing Russia oil sanctions to offset Hormuz oil disruption, weakening sanctions leverage on Moscow
iran_conventional: Parchin Taleghan 2 struck — Israeli bunker busters penetrated suspected nuclear weapon high-explosives testing chamber
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION DEEPENS: Day 15 — Conventional war intensifying on all fronts. Iran's leadership degraded (Khamenei wounded, scientists killed), regime rally struck. Iran retaliating with sustained missile/drone barrages across Gulf (114+ missiles intercepted by Bahrain alone, Oman casualties). Israel strikes Tehran continuously + Parchin military complex. TRUMP SANCTIONS RELIEF FOR RUSSIA: Biggest new development — Trump easing Russia oil sanctions to get more oil on market as Hormuz disruption spikes prices. This indirectly funds Russian war machine and weakens Ukraine sanctions leverage. NUCLEAR TRACK: Still de-escalating — Parchin strike is conventional targeting of weapon-development adjacent facility, NOT enrichment escalation. KEY WATCH FOR NEXT 6H: Whether Khamenei wound claim confirmed/released proof; Iran's 'additional fronts' hint — what/where; 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4 trigger; Israel Lebanon ground incursion; whether Trump follows through on Kharg oil infrastructure threat; Russia sanctions relief details and Ukraine reaction.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Parchin Taleghan 2 — bunker busters penetrate suspected nuclear weapon testing chamber
latest_news.source: ISW / Institute for Science and International Security
latest_news.text: Israeli strike on Taleghan 2 at Parchin military complex penetrated the high-explosive testing chamber. Bunker busters broke through concrete sarcophagus casing. Facility suspected of nuclear weapon development testing. Conventional strike on nuclear-adjacent military site.

latest_news.headline: Trump easing Russia oil sanctions to offset Hormuz disruption — 'We're going to take those sanctions off'
latest_news.text: Trump announced easing of Russia oil-related sanctions to compensate for Strait of Hormuz oil disruption. 'We're going to take those sanctions off until the strait [of Hormuz] is up.' Move could further ease Russian oil sanctions, complicating efforts to punish Moscow for Ukraine war.

latest_news.headline: US SecDef Hegseth says Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is wounded and 'likely disfigured'
latest_news.text: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said he believes Mojtaba Khamenei is wounded: 'We know the new so-called, not-so-supreme leader is wounded and likely disfigured.' Trump called killed Iranian leadership 'deranged scumbags.'

latest_news.headline: Blast near Tehran rally with senior officials — 1 killed
latest_news.text: Explosions struck near a pro-government rally in Tehran attended by security chief Ali Larijani, President Pezeshkian, and Foreign Minister Araghchi. At least 1 person killed. Israel and Iran exchanged new strikes.

latest_news.headline: Iran claims 500+ ballistic/naval missiles + ~2,000 drones fired since Feb 28 — 40% toward Israel, 60% at US targets
latest_news.text: Military source told Fars News that Iran has fired over 500 ballistic and naval missiles and almost 2,000 drones since Feb 28. Almost 40% aimed toward Israel, ~60% at US targets in region.

latest_news.headline: Oman: 2 killed after security forces intercepted drone near industrial area
latest_news.text: Two people died after security forces intercepted a drone near an industrial area in northern Oman, state media said. First reported casualties in Oman from the war.

latest_news.headline: Bahrain intercepted 114 missiles + 190 drones since war began Feb 28
latest_news.text: Bahrain reported intercepting 114 missiles and 190 drones since the war began on February 28. Home to US Navy Fifth Fleet. Massive Iranian targeting of Gulf states hosting US forces.

latest_news.headline: 250+ US organizations sign letter calling Congress to halt $11.3bn war funding
latest_news.text: More than 250 US organizations signed a letter calling on Congress to halt funding for the war. They argue the $11.3bn already spent is unsustainable. Growing domestic opposition to Iran war.

outlook: CRITICAL — Global war probability RISING to 46%. Day 15 opens with deepening escalation across all fronts: (1) ISRAEL STRIKES PARCHIN: Bunker busters penetrated Taleghan 2 high-explosives testing chamber at suspected nuclear weapon development site. Conventional strike on nuclear-adjacent military facility — no nuclear escalation signal but shows Israel systematically destroying Iran's weapon development infrastructure. (2) TRUMP EASES RUSSIA SANCTIONS: Major policy shift — easing Russia oil sanctions to offset Hormuz oil disruption. Gets more oil on market but directly funds Russian war machine and undermines Ukraine sanctions leverage. (3) IRANIAN LEADERSHIP DEGRADED: Hegseth claims Khamenei wounded/disfigured. Blast near rally with top officials. Combined with scientists killed + nuclear sites struck, Iran's decision-making capacity degrading. (4) GULF WAR INTENSIFYING: Iran fired 500+ missiles + 2,000 drones since Feb 28. Bahrain alone intercepted 114 missiles + 190 drones. Oman now has casualties. Saudi downing drones. Gulf-wide defense under extreme pressure. (5) DOMESTIC US PRESSURE: 250+ organizations demand Congress halt war funding. $11.3bn spent. Political opposition growing. NEXT 6H WATCH: Khamenei wound confirmation/proof; Iran's 'additional fronts' — what and where; 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4 trigger; Israel Lebanon ground incursion timing; Russia sanctions relief details + Ukraine response; whether Trump follows through on Kharg oil infrastructure threat.
